title: Looking for Category Manager at Porter

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Porter
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
